description_long: This rifle features a sleek, modern design with a predominantly black metallic body and a wooden or polymer stock. The barrel is long and slender, extending well beyond the main body, and is paired with a prominent cylindrical drum magazine beneath the receiver. The upper receiver includes a rail system, likely for mounting optics or accessories, and the trigger guard is clearly defined. The stock appears ergonomic, with a smooth, contoured grip for comfortable handling. The overall construction suggests a blend of metal and wood or synthetic materials, giving it a robust yet refined appearance.
description: A modern black rifle with a long barrel, drum magazine, and a contoured wooden or polymer stock.
description_view_0: Front view showing the narrow barrel tip and the rounded stock end.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long barrel, drum magazine, and rail system on top.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the stock and the alignment of the barrel.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the same features as view 1, with the stock and magazine visible.
